title: Death and rebirth death of Kaji
display_title: Death and rebirth death of Kaji
wikitext:
[]: Death and rebirth' death of Kaji             Quote Post by cloud7900 » Sun Sep 09, 2007 7:42 pm well, i know that Misato wasn't the one that killed Kaji, but, i've just seen death and rebirth, and, well, i seemed like she did.....

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 7:43 pm Random NERV agent #1?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 09, 2007 7:44 pm More like random NERV or SEELE agent, amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 7:53 pm Anno himself said that a nameless security officer killed Kaji. Misato's fate is pretty similar- severely wounded by another nameless grunt, and then blasted by a bomb right after Rei's messenger visits.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Sep 09, 2007 8:42 pm A while back on 4chan, in a "is so-and-so GAR?" thread, someone brought up Kaji, and I replied: Well, he smiles at the guy that's been sent to off him and tells him "You're a bit late" (meaning, I suppose, that he had already passed the microchip with NERV and SEELE's secrets on to Misato); Is that GAR enough for you?

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Sun Sep 09, 2007 8:57 pm Personally I always thought that SEELE killed Kaji. If you think about it it makes sense. Kaji had just let their prisoner go so they had to be pretty angry and Fuyutsuki alluded to that when Kaji freed him.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:00 pm TemporalKnight wrote: Personally I always thought that SEELE killed Kaji. If you think about it it makes sense. Kaji had just let their prisoner go so they had to be pretty angry and Fuyutsuki alluded to that when Kaji freed him.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:02 pm TemporalKnight wrote: Personally I always thought that SEELE killed Kaji. If you think about it it makes sense. Kaji had just let their prisoner go so they had to be pretty angry and Fuyutsuki alluded to that when Kaji freed him.

[]: hmm             Quote Post by cloud7900 » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:04 pm hmmm, then i has to be a sub problem.

[]: Re: hmm             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:10 pm cloud7900 wrote: hmmm, then i has to be a sub problem.

[]:             Quote Post by cloud7900 » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:16 pm well, while the camera goes down from the giant ventilator to Kaji smoking...i can hear Misato's crying and saying "idiot" (baka) *crying sigh*, "you're an idiot" (blablabla baka) *crying sighs*....to which then the camera goes directly to Kaji's face and he says "estas atrasada" (which in spanish, is "you're late", but the "a" at the end of "atrasada" gives a the term a "she" implication).....it must be a subs problem

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:20 pm Also, by somebody on SEELE's side killing Kaji, it was a warning to put Gendo in his place.

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Also, by somebody on SEELE's side killing Kaji, it was a warning to put Gendo in his place.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:31 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Also, by somebody on SEELE's side killing Kaji, it was a warning to put Gendo in his place.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:33 pm cloud7900 wrote: well, while the camera goes down from the giant ventilator to Kaji smoking...i can hear Misato's crying and saying "idiot" (baka) *crying sigh*, "you're an idiot" (blablabla baka) *crying sighs*....to which then the camera goes directly to Kaji's face and he says "estas atrasada" (which in spanish, is "you're late", but the "a" at the end of "atrasada" gives a the term a "she" implication).....it must be a subs problem

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:44 pm Thanks for that post, Shin. Now, I wouldn't count Spanish as being authoritative. Only the Japanese is truly such. I mean, the Spanish version added in Gendo, silent line, didn't it? XD

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:46 pm NAveryW wrote: Thanks for that post, Shin. Now, I wouldn't count Spanish as being authoritative. Only the Japanese is truly such. I mean, the Spanish version added in Gendo, silent line, didn't it? XD

[]:             Quote Post by TemporalKnight » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:49 pm (#23) according to SEELE, they let Fuyutsuki go... What's more, look at the rest of the sentence: "That man (i.e. Gendo) is smart enough to know the significance of why we allowed Fuyutsuki to return safely." ... SEELE: We need another human sacrifice to counter Ikari.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Sep 09, 2007 9:58 pm TemporalKnight wrote: This second line was before they took Ritsuko right? I can't quite remember.

[]:             Quote Post by Sandoz » Sun Sep 09, 2007 10:07 pm Some people need to remember that Kaji speaks in a familar, casual tone to everyone , including Gendo. The fact that he sounded friendly when greeting his killer does not mean that it was someone close to him. (And, really, he was expecting that bullet.)

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 09, 2007 7:43 pm Random NERV agent #1?
